WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id=ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date=ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id=ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date=ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  SUM(h.quantity * ps.price) AS 'Total'
FROM padded ps
JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id
WHERE '${status}'='HOLDING'
GROUP BY ps.as_of_date
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date;

SELECT
  t.symbol AS metric,
  CASE
    WHEN '${status}'='HOLDING' THEN (h.quantity * ps.price)
    ELSE ps.price
  END AS value
FROM v_ticker_status_multi s
JOIN tickers t ON t.id=s.ticker_id
LEFT JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN (
  SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS last_ts
  FROM price_snapshots
  GROUP BY ticker_id
) last ON last.ticker_id=t.id
JOIN price_snapshots ps ON ps.ticker_id=last.ticker_id AND ps.as_of_date=last.last_ts
LEFT JOIN v_fx_latest_with_inverse fx
  ON fx.base_currency = t.currency AND fx.quote_currency = '${currency}'
WHERE s.status='${status}'
ORDER BY value DESC;

WITH in_range AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  WHERE $__timeFilter(ps.as_of_date)
),
prev AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
next AS (
  SELECT ps.*
  FROM price_snapshots ps
  JOIN (
    SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS as_of_date
    FROM price_snapshots
    WHERE as_of_date > $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY ticker_id
  ) x ON x.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND x.as_of_date = ps.as_of_date
),
padded AS (
  SELECT * FROM in_range
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM prev
  UNION ALL SELECT * FROM next
),
base AS (
  SELECT
    t0.ticker_id,
    COALESCE(p_prev.price, p_first.price) AS base_price
  FROM (SELECT DISTINCT ticker_id FROM price_snapshots) t0
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MAX(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE as_of_date < $__timeFrom()
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_prev ON p_prev.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
  LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT b.ticker_id, p.price
    FROM (
      SELECT ticker_id, MIN(as_of_date) AS ts
      FROM price_snapshots
      WHERE $__timeFilter(as_of_date)
      GROUP BY ticker_id
    ) b
    JOIN price_snapshots p ON p.ticker_id=b.ticker_id AND p.as_of_date=b.ts
  ) p_first ON p_first.ticker_id = t0.ticker_id
)
SELECT
  UNIX_TIMESTAMP(ps.as_of_date) AS time_sec,
  SUM(h.quantity * (ps.price - base.base_price)) AS 'Total Gains in Period ${status}    '
FROM padded ps
JOIN holdings h ON h.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id
JOIN base ON base.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id
JOIN v_ticker_status_multi s ON s.ticker_id = ps.ticker_id AND s.status='${status}'
WHERE '${status}'='HOLDING'
GROUP BY ps.as_of_date
ORDER BY ps.as_of_date;
